steps.title: Rewrite the target value
steps.content:
Write $10{,}000$ as a power of $10$:
$$
10{,}000=10^4
$$
So the equation becomes
$$
10^{4x-2}=10^4
$$

steps.title: Equate the exponents
steps.content: The bases are equal, so the exponents are equal: $$ 4x-2=4 $$ $$ 4x=6 $$ $$ x=\frac{6}{4}=\frac{3}{2} $$ The answer is B.
